chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Appeal No.727 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 25.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Jawaid, Advocate for the appellant. Syed Noman Zahid Alvi, Advocate for Respondent-Bank. Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, DAG. ------------------------------- Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Jawaid, learned counsel for the appellant, submits that the appellant was released from jail after serving the sentence on 05.10.2024 and since then he is not in his contact, therefore, he does not press this appeal for want of instructions. The record reflects that the appellant was released from jail more than one year ago and is not pursuing this appeal since then even otherwise. Hence the request of counsel for the appellant is allowed and the appeal is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Asif
